data.title: Neuron Factory Announces Strategic Investment Round from Leading Technology and AEC Investors
data.description: In Redwood City, California, Neuron Factory, Inc., a tech company established by former executives from Microsoft and Waymo, revealed a recent strategic funding round from prominent investors in construction technology and architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) sectors on March 31, 2026. The investment marks a significant milestone for the company as it moves forward with plans for growth and innovation.

China confirmed on Tuesday three Chinese vessels have navigated through the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, following coordination with the relevant parties.

data.title: iA Financial Group Will Hold Its Annual Meeting on May 7 and Has Made Available Its Annual Report and Meeting Documentation
data.description: In Quebec City, iA Financial Group has revealed that the Annual Shareholder Meeting of iA Financial Corporation Inc. and the Annual Meeting of the Sole Common Shareholder and of the Participating Policyholders of Industrial Alliance Insurance and Financial Services Inc. will take place jointly on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time in a hybrid format. Shareholders and participating policyholders are invited to attend the meeting virtually.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Noble Investment Group/
data.description: Noble Investment Group has recently announced the promotion of six individuals within its platform in a news release dated March 31, 2026. The company has issued a correction to the initial announcement, now stating that seven individuals have been promoted instead. This update provides greater clarity on the changes within the organization. The promoted individuals will be taking on new roles and responsibilities as part of their advancement within Noble Investment Group.

data.title: GOAT Group Introduces Sneakers.com, Expanding Access to Great Footwear at Exceptional Value
data.description: A well-established brand is expanding its reach by introducing a fresh array of products to a wider consumer base in Los Angeles. On March 31, 2026, GOAT Group, a renowned global platform catering to all things related to past, present, and future trends, unveiled Sneakers.com. This new online destination is designed to cater to the everyday sneaker shopper, providing a convenient one-stop shop for a diverse selection of footwear.

data.title: After a $500K CFTC settlement, KuCoin banned US users and must register to resume service - court order.
data.description: A federal court has issued a permanent order preventing the exchange from catering to customers in the United States unless it completes the registration process.

data.title: Gas price surge due to Iran war prompts fresh food distributors to add fuel surcharges for perishable goods transportation.
data.description: The cost of transporting perishable foods like salmon and fruits has increased due to rising diesel prices amid the conflict with Iran. The surge in diesel prices has led to a significant rise in transportation expenses for these goods, impacting the overall cost of delivering perishable items to consumers. This escalation in prices has added pressure to the already-strained supply chain, making it more expensive for businesses to transport goods to various destinations. As a result, consumers may experience higher prices for perishable products due to the increased costs associated with transportation.

data.title: Andersen Consulting Strengthens Capabilities with Addition of Lukkap
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has announced a new collaboration with Lukkap, a consultancy specializing in experience-driven capabilities. This collaboration aims to enhance Andersen Consulting's services by leveraging Lukkap's expertise. Andersen Consulting is known for its innovative approaches, and this partnership allows them to further expand their offerings. Lukkap's focus on experience-driven capabilities brings a valuable perspective to the table. The partnership is expected to bring significant benefits to both firms and their clients.

data.title: Broadcasting from Phenom Studios: Inside the AI Infrastructure, Agents and Deployment Models Redesigning Work Operations and Delivering Results in Weeks
data.description: Philadelphia hosted an HR Innovation Showcase unveiling cutting-edge WorkOps innovations. The event offered an exclusive glimpse into groundbreaking technologies in the field of HR. Numerous companies showcased their latest advancements, with attendees numbering in the thousands. This event marks a significant step forward in revolutionizing HR practices and incorporating advanced technologies to streamline operations.
Max Miller has recently revealed his latest stock transactions.

data.title: US₮ selects Celo for expansion, offering compliant digital dollars to 4.23M users beyond Ethereum.
data.description: The regulated stablecoin USA₮, backed by Tether, has been introduced on the Celo network. This move aims to provide federally compliant digital dollars to the network's 4.23 million weekly active users.

data.title: Asset Panda Launches AI-Powered Platform to Modernize Asset Management for State and Local Governments
data.description: In a recent press release on March 31, 2026 from Frisco, Texas, Asset Panda introduced Ursa, a new AI-driven platform aimed at aiding state and local government agencies in overseeing infrastructure, equipment, and public safety assets with greater efficiency. Ursa is a cutting-edge technology designed to streamline asset management processes for government entities.

data.title: AMPLIFON INVESTS IN AUDIOLOGICAL RESEARCH AND INNOVATION WITH THE APPOINTMENT OF DR. NICHOLAS REED AS VP AUDIOLOGY INNOVATION & RESEARCH
data.description: Renowned specialist in audiology and public health, Dr. Reed has been appointed by Amplifon, the parent company of Miracle-Ear, as part of a newly created position. The global leader in hearing care services made the announcement on March 31, 2026. Dr. Reed's expertise in the field will bring valuable insight to the company's operations and research endeavors. Amplifon's decision reflects their commitment to advancing hearing health, with Dr. Reed's appointment being a significant milestone in this pursuit.

data.title: Guardian completes integration with FINEOS to expand digital capabilities and deliver a simplified leave experience
data.description: The company has introduced upgraded absence features, enhancing its capacity to provide a contemporary and interconnected leave system for employees and HR departments. This initiative aims to promote well-being®. The launch took place in New York on March 31, 2026. The updates are intended to improve the leave experience and support HR teams efficiently.

data.title: McDermott and Chiyoda Complete Construction and Commissioning of Golden Pass LNG Train 1
data.description: In Sabine Pass, Texas, McDermott and Chiyoda International Corporation (CIC) have almost finished constructing and commissioning Train 1 of the Golden Pass LNG Project. This project represents a significant milestone in the energy sector.

data.title: IBM and ETH Zurich join forces to shape the future of algorithms for the AI and quantum era
data.description: IBM and ETH Zurich have partnered on a decade-long program to enhance fundamental algorithmic research. This joint effort aims to create essential algorithms for the AI and quantum computing era. As part of the collaboration, IBM will assist in establishing ETH Zurich professorships dedicated to steering collaborative research ventures.

data.title: Unanet and CIO Steve Karp Receive Global Recognition for Results-Driven Artificial Intelligence
data.description: Unanet, a company based in DULLES, Va., was honored with a prestigious award for their exceptional utilization of artificial intelligence. This recognition highlights their transition from reactive intelligence to autonomous execution. Unanet, known for their AI-first ERP and growth software tailored for project-based businesses, received the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award for their remarkable achievements. This acknowledgment showcases their innovative approach and dedication to leveraging technology for success.

data.title: Logile Launches Fresh Operations Management Suite to Help Grocers Turn Fresh Into a Scalable Growth Engine
data.description: Logile, Inc., a prominent global provider of AI-driven Connected Workforce solutions, has unveiled its new Fresh Operations Management suite in Dallas. This innovative offering focuses on a revamped operating model tailored to the nuances of the fresh produce sector. The suite integrates customer demand, labor capacity, and cost visibility to streamline production, inventory management, waste control, and food safety practices. By harmonizing these components, the platform ensures efficient operations and enhanced performance.

data.title: Breakwall Capital and Vitol Announce the Closing of Valor Mining Credit Partners II
data.description: Breakwall Capital LP and Vitol have jointly closed Valor Mining Credit Partners II, L.P. (VMP II), following the successful deployment of their first partnership, Valor Mining Credit Partners, L.P., which invested around $470 million in less than six months. Breakwall Capital LP is an independent asset management firm specializing in the energy sector, while Vitol is renowned for its expertise in energy and commodities. VMP II is the latest venture in their collaboration to invest in the mining industry.
